name: Grasshopper Brownies Supreme
recipeIngredient: 21 1/2 oz Pkg Pillsbury Fudge Brownie Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease the bottom only of a 13x9-inch pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine the brownie mix ingredients and stir until well mixed. Spread the batter evenly in the greased pan.
3. Bake for 33 to 35 minutes or until set. Remove from oven and let cool completely.
4. In a medium bowl, beat together the margarine and cream cheese until light and fluffy. Gradually add the remaining filling ingredients and beat until smooth. Spread the mixture evenly over the cooled brownies.
5. In a small saucepan, melt the frosting ingredients (chocolate chips and milk) over low heat, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and let cool for 15 minutes.
6. Pour the frosting over the filling, spreading carefully to cover. Refrigerate for 1 hour before cutting into bars.
7. Garnish as desired. Store in refrigerator.
Recipe By: Classic Cookbooks, 1994
